{"file_path":"/home/runner/work/Kody-Engine-Tester/Kody-Engine-Tester/.kody/tasks/2303-260417-184432/plan.md","content":"# Plan: P2T08 — Verify @kody resolve detects and resolves merge conflicts

## Context

Task 2303-260417-184432 is an integration test that verifies the `@kody resolve` command (part of the Kody CI pipeline) correctly detects and resolves merge conflicts on a PR. The test:
1. Finds a completed PR in the Kody-Engine-Tester repository
2. Creates a safe merge conflict on the PR's base branch (NOT the default branch)
3. Triggers `@kody resolve` via a GitHub issue comment
4. Verifies the pipeline detects the conflict, merges, resolves, and pushes
5. Cleans up by reverting the conflict commit from the base branch

No code changes are needed — this is purely an operational verification task.

## Prerequisites

1. Confirm at least one closed/merged PR exists in the repo (`gh pr list --state closed`)
2. The PR must have files that can be safely edited without b… [+2587 chars]
